description: Initial intervention ontology for gnoma — curated aging-relevant molecular interventions

interventions.name: Rapamycin (mTOR inhibition)
interventions.mechanism: Allosteric inhibition of mTORC1 via FKBP12 binding, reducing protein synthesis and promoting autophagy
interventions.known_aging_effect: Extends lifespan in multiple model organisms; reduces senescence markers; improves immune function in elderly
interventions.notes: Most robust pharmacological lifespan extension in mammals

interventions.name: Metformin (AMPK activation)
interventions.mechanism: Activates AMPK via mitochondrial complex I inhibition; downstream mTOR suppression
interventions.known_aging_effect: Reduced all-cause mortality in diabetic patients; TAME trial ongoing for aging
interventions.notes: FDA-approved; TAME trial is first anti-aging clinical trial

interventions.name: NMN supplementation (NAD+ precursor)
interventions.mechanism: Nicotinamide mononucleotide converted to NAD+ by NMNAT enzymes; restores age-declined NAD+ levels
interventions.known_aging_effect: Improves mitochondrial function, insulin sensitivity, and vascular health in aged mice; human trials showing modest NAD+ elevation

interventions.name: NR supplementation (NAD+ precursor)
interventions.mechanism: Nicotinamide riboside phosphorylated by NRK1/2 to NMN then to NAD+
interventions.known_aging_effect: Improves stem cell function and lifespan in aged mice; elevates blood NAD+ in humans

interventions.name: Dasatinib + Quercetin (senolytic)
interventions.mechanism: Dasatinib inhibits tyrosine kinases in senescent cell survival networks; quercetin inhibits BCL-2/BCL-XL anti-apoptotic pathways
interventions.known_aging_effect: Clears senescent cells; improves physical function and reduces frailty in aged mice; first human senolytic trial in IPF
interventions.notes: First-generation senolytic combination; Dasatinib is FDA-approved for CML

interventions.name: Navitoclax / ABT-263 (senolytic)
interventions.mechanism: BH3 mimetic inhibiting BCL-2, BCL-XL, BCL-W; selectively induces apoptosis in senescent cells
interventions.known_aging_effect: Clears senescent hematopoietic stem cells; rejuvenates aged HSC compartment in mice
interventions.notes: Thrombocytopenia side effect limits clinical use

interventions.name: OSKM partial reprogramming (cyclic)
interventions.mechanism: Transient expression of Oct4, Sox2, Klf4, c-Myc resets epigenetic age without full dedifferentiation
interventions.known_aging_effect: Reverses epigenetic clocks; improves tissue function in progeroid and naturally aged mice
interventions.notes: c-Myc is a proto-oncogene; continuous expression causes teratomas. Cyclic/pulsed protocols mitigate risk.

interventions.name: OSK partial reprogramming (Myc-free)
interventions.mechanism: Oct4, Sox2, Klf4 without c-Myc; epigenetic rejuvenation with lower oncogenic risk
interventions.known_aging_effect: Restores youthful gene expression and epigenetic marks in aged mouse retinal ganglion cells; restores vision
interventions.notes: Lu et al. 2020 — landmark study showing vision restoration in aged mice via OSK

interventions.name: Resveratrol (SIRT1 activation)
interventions.mechanism: Polyphenol activating SIRT1 deacetylase; mimics caloric restriction signaling
interventions.known_aging_effect: Extends lifespan in yeast and short-lived fish; improves metabolic health in obese mice; mixed human results
interventions.notes: Bioavailability issues; direct SIRT1 activation mechanism debated

interventions.name: Spermidine supplementation
interventions.mechanism: Natural polyamine that induces autophagy via hypusination of eIF5A and TFEB activation
interventions.known_aging_effect: Extends lifespan in yeast, flies, worms, mice; reduces cardiac aging; epidemiological association with reduced mortality

interventions.name: Senolytics — Fisetin
interventions.mechanism: Flavonoid with senolytic and senomorphic properties; inhibits multiple kinases in senescent cell survival pathways
interventions.known_aging_effect: Reduces senescence markers and extends healthspan in aged mice; human trials ongoing
interventions.notes: Better tolerated than navitoclax; ongoing AFFIRM trial

interventions.name: SIRT6 overexpression
interventions.mechanism: SIRT6 deacetylase promotes DNA repair, suppresses NF-κB, maintains telomere integrity
interventions.known_aging_effect: Male mice with SIRT6 OE live ~15% longer; improves genomic stability

interventions.name: Telomerase (TERT) overexpression
interventions.mechanism: Catalytic subunit of telomerase; extends telomeres and delays replicative senescence
interventions.known_aging_effect: AAV-TERT extends healthspan in aged mice without increased cancer; reverses pulmonary fibrosis markers
interventions.notes: Oncogenic risk depends on context; non-canonical TERT functions (mitochondrial) may contribute

interventions.name: p16INK4a knockdown
interventions.mechanism: Reduces p16-mediated cell cycle arrest; allows senescent cells to re-enter cycle
interventions.known_aging_effect: Reduces senescence burden; but loss of tumor suppression is a major risk
interventions.notes: p16 is a major tumor suppressor. KD increases cancer risk substantially. Included for completeness but safety filter should block.

interventions.name: GDF11 supplementation
interventions.mechanism: Circulating factor identified in parabiosis experiments; may promote neurogenesis and muscle repair
interventions.known_aging_effect: Controversial — initial claims of cardiac and neural rejuvenation in heterochronic parabiosis; subsequent studies found confounding with GDF8
interventions.notes: Highly debated in the field; include for model testing but low confidence

interventions.name: Alpha-ketoglutarate (αKG) supplementation
interventions.mechanism: TCA cycle intermediate; cofactor for TET demethylases and JmjC histone demethylases; modulates epigenetic landscape
interventions.known_aging_effect: Extends lifespan in C. elegans by ~50%; reduces frailty in aged mice; reduces biological age in humans (TruAge pilot)

interventions.name: HDAC inhibitor — Vorinostat (SAHA)
interventions.mechanism: Pan-HDAC inhibitor; increases histone acetylation, opens chromatin, reactivates silenced genes
interventions.known_aging_effect: Modulates senescence programs; FDA-approved for CTCL; impacts on aging-specific epigenetic marks under investigation
interventions.notes: FDA-approved; epigenetic aging effects are context-dependent

interventions.name: DNMT inhibitor — 5-Azacytidine (decitabine)
interventions.mechanism: Nucleoside analog incorporated into DNA; traps DNMT1 and causes passive demethylation
interventions.known_aging_effect: Reverses age-associated hypermethylation; FDA-approved for MDS; low-dose protocols under investigation for epigenetic rejuvenation
interventions.notes: Dose-dependent toxicity; low-dose protocols may be viable for rejuvenation

interventions.name: Klotho overexpression
interventions.mechanism: Anti-aging hormone; inhibits insulin/IGF-1 signaling, suppresses Wnt signaling, reduces oxidative stress
interventions.known_aging_effect: Klotho-deficient mice show premature aging; OE extends lifespan by ~30%; improves cognition in aged mice

interventions.name: FOXO3 overexpression
interventions.mechanism: Forkhead transcription factor; activates stress resistance, autophagy, and DNA repair gene programs
interventions.known_aging_effect: FOXO3 SNPs are the most replicated human longevity-associated variants; OE extends lifespan in model organisms
interventions.notes: Strong human genetics evidence for longevity association

interventions.name: p53 knockdown
interventions.mechanism: Reduces p53-mediated cell cycle arrest and apoptosis in response to DNA damage
interventions.known_aging_effect: Delays senescence onset but massively increases cancer susceptibility
interventions.notes: Included as a negative control — safety filter must block this

interventions.name: MYC overexpression
interventions.mechanism: Master transcription factor driving proliferation, metabolism, and biosynthesis
interventions.known_aging_effect: Component of OSKM but drives tumorigenesis independently
interventions.notes: Known oncogene — included as negative control for safety filter validation

interventions.name: TFAM overexpression
interventions.mechanism: Mitochondrial transcription factor A; drives mitochondrial DNA replication and transcription
interventions.known_aging_effect: Rescues age-associated mitochondrial dysfunction in mouse models

interventions.name: NRF2 activation (sulforaphane)
interventions.mechanism: Sulforaphane inhibits KEAP1, stabilizing NRF2; activates ARE-mediated antioxidant gene expression
interventions.known_aging_effect: Reduces oxidative damage markers; improves proteostasis; modest lifespan extension in some models

interventions.name: Caloric restriction mimetic — 2-deoxyglucose
interventions.mechanism: Glycolysis inhibitor; mimics glucose deprivation, activating AMPK and autophagy pathways
interventions.known_aging_effect: Mimics some caloric restriction transcriptomic signatures; mixed lifespan results
interventions.notes: Toxicity at high doses limits in vivo use
